zh.Birmingham, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾比米加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Albreda de Birmingham於1304年出生在英國瓦維其可爾比米加姆時，她的父親William de Bermingham42歲，母親Matilda Deincourt36歲。她於1323年與Simon de Holt在英國武斯特斯爾亞德利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1334年在英國瓦維其可爾享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albreda de Birmingham于1304年出生在英国瓦維其可爾比米加姆时，她的父亲William de Bermingham42岁，母亲Matilda Deincourt36岁。她于1323年与Simon de Holt在英国武斯特斯爾亞德利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1334年在英国瓦維其可爾享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Birmingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Birmingham in the West Midlands. In Domesday Book the name is already found as Bermingeham, but it seems likely that it was originally Beornmundingahām ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of (-inga-) Beornmund’, a personal name composed of the elements beorn ‘young man, warrior’ + mund ‘protection’. This surname is established in Ireland (see Bermingham ).

variants.name: Burningham
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire): variant of   Birmingham  .

variants.name: Bermingham
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Sinead.
Irish (of English origin): variant of   Birmingham  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Ireland.

History: The Bermingham family take their surname from lands held at what is now a great city in the West Midlands of England, but it was brought to Ireland as early as the 12th century. The Norman baron Robert de Bermyngeham was a follower of Strongbow (see Clare ); his name is found on a number of Irish charters between 1175 and 1179. The family was also known as Mac Fheorais (see Corish ) in Ireland, named for Piers (Gaelic Feoras) de Bermyngeham, the father of Robert.

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Albreda de Birmingham was born in 1304, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, her father, William de Bermingham, was 42 and her mother, Matilda Deincourt, was 36. She married Simon de Holt in 1323, in Yardley, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1334, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albreda de Birmingham est née en 1304, à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Bermingham, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Matilda Deincourt, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Simon de Holt en 1323, à Yardley, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1334, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albreda de Birmingham 1304 in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Bermingham 42 und ihre Mutter Matilda Deincourt 36. Sie hat 1323 in Yardley, Worcestershire, England Simon de Holt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1334 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda de Birmingham è nata il nel 1304 nel Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William de Bermingham, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Matilda Deincourt, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Simon de Holt nel 1323, nel Yardley, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1334, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albreda de Birminghamが1304年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバーミンガムで生まれた時，父William de Berminghamは42歳，母Matilda Deincourtは36歳であった。1323年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアヤードリーでSimon de Holtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1334年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albreda de Birmingham(이)가 1304년 영국 워윅실르 비밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Bermingham(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Deincourt(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1323년 영국 워스스터실르 야어들리에서 Simon de Holt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 워윅실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda de Birmingham nasceu em 1304, em Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Bermingham, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Deincourt, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon de Holt em 1323, em Yardley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1334, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albreda de Birmingham родилась в 1304 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Bermingham было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Deincourt, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon de Holt в 1323 г. в местности ярдли, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1334 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albreda de Birmingham nació en 1304, en Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Bermingham, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Matilda Deincourt, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Simon de Holt en 1323, en Yardley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1334, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
